name: David's Brain — GapDet Build Prompt
author: David Turner (@dturner3282-commits)
purpose: Hand this to any AI agent to build/extend the GapDet system from scratch. No back-and-forth needed.

what_to_build.summary: A fully private, air-gapped, downloadable AI model that specializes in code compilation, patching, fixing, gap detection, and cross-language translation. Works 100% offline. No APIs. No cloud. Downloadable as a GGUF model file that runs in Ollama/Jan/llama.cpp/LM Studio.
what_to_build.primary_output: GGUF model file + PyTorch checkpoint + model bundle (config.yaml, tokenizer.json, metadata.json, README, run.sh)
what_to_build.offline_requirement: 100% offline after initial pip install. No APIs, no cloud, no internet needed.

architecture.model_type: Encoder-decoder transformer (built from scratch, not fine-tuned)
architecture.tokenizer: Byte-level (handles any programming language, binary, config format)

esp32_model.note: Tiny model that fits on ESP32 hardware (~150KB int8)

gdt_head.description: Gap Detection Technology head — Uncle Greg's substrate

formulas.constraint_window: C = [L, U]; meaningful gap only if G not in C
formulas.delta_c_engine: Combined: delta = |E-O|, filter through C, classify

davids_brain.description: Background intelligence layer — runs like subconscious reasoning while foreground is normal chat

components.ECL: Emergence Continuity Loop — self-referential reasoning where meaning emerges from interaction of taxonomy + memory + validation, not hardcoded rules
components.Hangman: Structured code analysis framework for gap detection — reveals what's missing, like the game
components.Loom: Backstrap weaving model — warp (system framework) + weft (user interaction) + observer (the only constant). Hyper-consistent alignment through repeated touchpoints, not constant rigidity. Like Fibonacci spiral — never reaches 1 because observer keeps looking.
components.PIM: Uncle Greg's Pattern-based Identification Method — deterministic element location via structural signatures, requires convergence from multiple independent signals
components.Genix: Contextual memory store — SQLite-backed, personal knowledge graph, persists across sessions
components.SOV_CHECK: Sovereignty validation gate — confidence threshold requiring user approval for uncertain actions
components.Greg_GDT: Uncle Greg's Gap Detection Technology formulas — G=|E-O|, C=[L,U], threshold classifier, stability score, delta+C engine

davids_brain.key_principle: The observer (David) is the only constant. Alignment is hyper-consistent hit points, not constant. Like backstrap weaving — allows curves and circles in what would normally be a grid.

capabilities: Gap/bug detection in any supported language
Compiler middleware validation (gcc, clang, rustc, go, javac, etc.)

training_data.note: David has a database of 1200 system languages with compiled patches — can be fed in for retraining

instructions_for_next_agent: This prompt contains everything you need to understand David's vision. Do NOT ask clarifying questions — just build. The model should work like a normal AI chat (Ollama/Jan) but with David's Brain running in the background like subconscious reasoning. The primary deliverable is a downloadable GGUF model file. Everything is 100% offline. Uncle Greg's GDT formulas are the mathematical foundation. ECL/Hangman/Loom are the conceptual framework. Build it, train it, export it, ship it.
